features: Email logs: flag important mail, compact filters, improved reading pane
Ticket view: Reply to Customer / Reply to Vendor with thread isolation
Outlook-style clean reply compose (signature + empty body; headers preserve threading)
CC stored in outbox log and shown in email read header
Admin release management — update version and feature notes from the app
Email logs polish, flags, quick reply from ticket view
Initial production release — IMAP, tickets, SMTP, dashboard, notifications
